name: Phreesia, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Phreesia, Inc. ("Phreesia," "we," "our," or the "Company") was founded in 2005 and completed its initial public offering in July 2019. Phreesia provides an integrated software, payments, and engagement platform designed to address three foundational challenges in healthcare delivery: access to care, affordability of care, and patient health outcomes.
